meaning: adj.普遍的,全体的,通用的,宇宙的,世界的
examples: Agreement on this issue is almost universal.
Several writers have posited the idea of a universal consciousness.
The dove is a universal symbol of peace.
"We have to defend the principle of universality and universal access, " he told BBC News.
Only half of all countries have achieved the most watched goal of universal primary enrolment.
